task_description: Set up a complete test automation suite from scratch for a Next.js 16 task manager app. Install and configure Jest + React Testing Library, create Supabase mocks, write unit tests for server actions and middleware, and write component tests for AddTaskForm and TaskList.

verification.summary: All 45 tests pass across 6 test suites (1.9s). Tests cover server actions (16 tests), login action (4 tests), signup action (4 tests), middleware (11 tests), AddTaskForm component (5 tests), TaskList component (9 tests). Test quality verified: tests exercise actual code paths, use realistic interactions, test optimistic updates with rollback, and would fail if implementation were reverted.
